name: The Sand Trap
about: The Sand Trap is a year-round indoor golf simulator venue in Cheyenne, Wyoming, featuring two private Trackman bays for play, practice, and lessons. The venue offers access to over 400 courses including 51 tour venues and provides Trackman data for game improvement. Membership options are available with tiered hour packages, an initiation fee, and exclusive access to leagues, tournaments, and facility rentals. The facility is currently at capacity with a waitlist for new members.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium Trackman technology with detailed swing data analysis
Access to over 400 championship courses including Pebble Beach and St. Andrews
24/7 availability for members with weather-proof year-round play
Exclusive member leagues, tournaments, and facility rental options
On-site PGA professional instruction available with Trackman data integration

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of food service or kitchen facilities
No mention of alcohol service or bar

simulator_hardware.notes: 2 private bays for play and practice with full swing and shot data tracking

faq.answer: The venue does not specify whether club rentals are available or if members must bring their own clubs.

faq.answer: There is no mention of food or drink service, suggesting BYOB may be allowed, but this is not explicitly confirmed.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The venue does not provide specific timing information for 18-hole rounds in the simulator.

faq.question: Is The Sand Trap kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The venue offers family memberships and mentions birthday party rentals, suggesting it accommodates families with children, though specific age restrictions or youth programs are not detailed.
